name: Deadly rails
short_description: FIGHT YOUR WAY TROUGH THE HOARD OF UNDEAD AND REACH YOUR GOAL , THE ONLY LIMIT IS YOUR WITZ AND DETERMINATION.
detailed_description: Embark on a harrowing journey in search of the last safe haven on Earth. As the world crumbles around you, survival depends on your wits, resourcefulness, and the relentless drive to keep moving. Navigate a treacherous landscape aboard your train, fending off relentless hordes of the undead and the terrifying new monstrosities born from the apocalypse. Manage your dwindling fuel, scavenge for supplies, and make life-or-death decisions to ensure your journey doesn’t end in despair. The road ahead is uncertain, but one thing is clear—only the strongest will reach their destination.
